name: Stuffed Cucumbers
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel cucumbers and cut in half lengthwise. Scoop out seeds from each half.
2. Place cucumber halves, cut side down, in a large skillet. Add instant bouillon and water; stir well.
3. Heat to boiling and reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes. Drain on paper towels and reserve broth.
4. Melt butter in a small skillet. Saute radishes until soft. Stir in bread crumbs and marjoram, then add reserved broth. Mix well.
5. Arrange cucumber halves in a shallow baking dish. Fill with bread crumb mixture.
6. Sprinkle cheese over the cucumbers. Combine egg, milk, salt, and pepper; pour into the baking dish.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes. Remove from oven.
8. Bake an additional 20 minutes or until custard is set.
